_comment: Copy this to personas/your-persona-id/sources.json and edit. Run: python execution/download_corpus.py --persona your-persona-id

priority_1.title: Famous Book Title
priority_1.author: Author Name
priority_1._comment: Find the ID in the URL: gutenberg.org/ebooks/23 → ID is 23. Best for pre-1928 US works (clean plain text, no OCR).

priority_1.title: Another Famous Book
priority_1.author: Author Name
priority_1._comment: Internet Archive: good for 20th century works. search_terms is sent to archive.org search.

priority_2.title: Hard to Find Work
priority_2.author: Author Name
priority_2._comment: Manual: place the file yourself in corpus/raw/. Neither downloader will touch this entry.
